parsed.anchor_match: Competent — clear hierarchy, consistent layout, working loading/empty/error states, focus-trapped modals, step indicator with back-nav

parsed.anchor_rejected_above:
Level 4 fails on multiple required anchors. (a) The reservation countdown is computed once per render with no setInterval/state tick — `BookDetailPage.tsx:10-22 formatTimeRemaining` is called inline at line 103 inside JSX with no useEffect to re-render, so the HH:MM:SS does NOT 'update without page reload'. (b) The catalog has no secondary affordance: `BooksPage.tsx:42-51` renders `
{books.map(book => )}
` with zero sort, filter, or search controls. (c) Confirm-destructive actions lack a distinct danger treatment — `MemberDetailPage.tsx:130-139` uses default-primary `` (a `.btn-danger` class exists in `index.css:200-207` but is unused in any flow). (d) Visual emphasis is mostly color, not 'color + icon': the overdue badge `index.css:484-491` and `MemberDetailPage.tsx:38 {loan.days_overdue} days overdue` is text+color only with no icon.
